urdu transliteration text: Reciter: Ali Hassan

Teen Mehroom Baitiyaan, Teen Mazloom Baitiyaan
Three deprived daughters, Three oppressed daughters
Aik Zehra Nabi Ki Baiti Hai, Aik Zainab Ali Ki Baiti Hai
english translation text: Zahra is the daughter of the Prophet, Zainab is the daughter of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Jisko Kehtay Hai Sab Ghreeb e Hussain, Ik Sakina Usi Ki Baiti Hai
english translation text: Husayn is known to all of us as the destitute martyr, Sakina is the daughter of the same Imam

urdu transliteration text: Teeno Shehzaadiyo Ko Ummat Nai Khoo Rulaaya Kaha Kaha
english translation text: All three princesses at the hands of the disciples, were tormented at every place

urdu transliteration text:
Teen Mazloom BaitiyaanTeen Mehroom Baitiyaan, Teen Mazloom Baitiyaan
Three oppressed daughters,Three deprived daughters, Three oppressed daughters
Haai Zahra Ko Yu Sataaya Gaya, Zindagi Bhar Usay Rulaaya Gaya
english translation text: Alas, Zahra was always agonized, Alas, she wept and sobbed all her life

urdu transliteration text: Yay Sitam Bhi Hua Hai Baad e Nabi, Us Ko Darbaar Mai Bulaaya Gaya
english translation text: This also happened after the Prophet’s demise, She was forced and taken to the court

urdu transliteration text: Ajr Ummat Nai Yu Chukaya Hai, Rad Hui Sab Gawahiyyaan
english translation text: The followers repaid the retribution of the Prophet, By rebuffing and deposing all her testimonies

urdu transliteration text:
Teen Mazloom BaitiyaanTeen Mehroom Baitiyaan, Teen Mazloom Baitiyaan
Three opressed daughters,Three deprived daughters, Three oppressed daughters
Kaisa Sadma Hai Baad e Nabi, Gam Pe Gam Hi Mila Hai Baad e Nabi
english translation text: What a blow to her soon after Prophet’s demise, She was afflicted and grieved after Prophet’s demise

urdu transliteration text: Ghar Jalaa Ker Gira Ke Darwaaza, Yay Sitam Bhi Hua Hai Baad e Nabi
english translation text: Her house was burned, she was crushed under the burning door, This agony also happened after the Prophet’s demise

urdu transliteration text: Kar Diya Hai Shaheed Mohsin Ko, Or Tori Hai Pasliyaan
english translation text: Her unborn child Mohsin got martyred in her womb, Her ribs got trampled and shattered under the doors

urdu transliteration text:
Teen Mazloom BaitiyaanTeen Mehroom Baitiyaan, Teen Mazloom Baitiyaan
Three oppressed daughters,Three deprived daughters, Three oppressed daughters
Haal Dil Ka Kabhi Suna Na Saki, Haath Pehloo Sai Yay Uthna Na Saki
english translation text: She was not able to speak out her heart to anyone, she was unable to move her hand from her side

urdu transliteration text: Haai Kitni Ghareeb Hai Zahra, Qabr Mai Bhi Yay Chen Pa Na Saki
english translation text: Alas, so pain stricken was Zahra, Not even able to rest in her grave

urdu transliteration text: Itni Mazloom Hai Kai Turbat Bhi, Hai Mohtaj e Saaibaan
english translation text: So grief stricken is that her grave till today, Still lacks basic shelter or cover

urdu transliteration text:
Teen Mazloom BaitiyaanTeen Mehroom Baitiyaan, Teen Mazloom Baitiyaan
Three oppressed daughters,Three deprived daughters, Three oppressed daughters
Aik Zahra Hai Aik Zainab Hai, Ik Sakina Hussain Ki Hai Jaan
english translation text: One is Zahra, Other is Zainab, The third one is beloved daughter of Hussain

urdu transliteration text:
Teen Mazloom Baitiyaan
Three oppressed daughters
